title: EventGatewayParsedRecordEncryptionSelector
description: Selects fields of a parsed record for encryption and defines what key to encrypt them with.

paths.description: Selects which fields of the parsed record to encrypt. A maximum of 50 path entries are allowed.

match.description:
A field selector. It can select nested fields and array entries.

Currently supported are exact matches.

fields.name: context.auth.principal.name
fields.description: Name of authenticated principal. Username in case of PLAIN/SCRAM, `sub` claim in case of OAUTHBEARER.

fields.name: context.auth.type
fields.description: The matched authentication type from a virtual cluster: anonymous, sasl_plain, sasl_scram_sha256, sasl_scram_sha512, sasl_oauth_bearer.

fields.name: context.auth.token.claims
fields.description: All claims from the JWT token. Only populated for sasl_oauth_bearer authentication. Claims can be strings, numbers, booleans, arrays or nested JSON objects.

fields.name: record.headers
fields.description: An associative array of header key value pairs.

fields.name: record.value.content
fields.description: The content of the record value.

oneOf.description:
This expression should evaluate to an array of exact field paths,
equivalent to the `match` values in the array variant.
